title: Pale World
description: The Pale Garden has become not just a biome in the world, but has enslaved all other biomes, making them pale too.
body:
![Savanna](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ccfa60ef29df45463b72416f4f7de813654b938_0.webp)

The Pale Garden has infected the entire Minecraft world and now all biomes have become one. All biomes now have gray tones. Although all biomes are covered in gray tones, the creaking lives only in a real pale garden.

_This project does not change the mechanics of all biomes, just the color scheme of the pale garden, so that the whole world looks pale. Some biomes do not have a customized color scheme and remain the same colors._
